title: Ultimate Road Signs and Signals
description: Forge only mod that adds dozens of traffic signs - including customizable direction signs, traffic lights and stuff for you to build more realistic roads
body:
**Forge only** mod that adds dozens of **traffic signs** - including customizable **direction signs, traffic lights and stuff for you to build more realistic roads**. As of 0.0.1, this mod is only available in **alpha** version.

## Items and blocks

### Road signs

As of 0.0.2, URSS adds a variety of French road signs : danger, prohibitory, mandatory, information, and **customizable** direction signs : set your own town and city signs with your own road markers.

Road signs are blocks that can be placed anywhere, and can be placed on top of **poles** (basically similar to iron bars)

The majority of the signs can be set in different sizes : **large**, or **small** (upper or lower part of block).

### Traffic lights

URSS adds some traffic lights : blinking single traffic light and blinking 2-light traffic light (for signaling railways for example), and classic 3-light traffic lights (2 modes for 2 ways, alternating. Click with hammer to change mode).

## Crafting

As of 0.0.2, there is no recipe for blocks and items. Thus, this mod can only be used in creative mod. Recipes are planned to be added in a future version.
